data.body:
**Completion verification — PASS**

All three acceptance criteria and the Scope requirement are met by the implementation.

---

**AC 1 — Overlays fire only on relevant plans; not-applicable returns no finding (near-zero false-fire)**

MET. `orchestrator.py:209–210` skips any deterministic overlay whose trigger did not fire (`if registry.is_overlay(cid) and cid in triggers and not triggers[cid]: continue`). `registry.py:214–240` (`applies()`) gates overlays by level, ticket type, and suppress_when conditions. Every LLM-routed T-overlay prompt opens with "PASS not-applicable" as the explicit baseline (confirmed in `plan_review_T10.md`, `plan_review_T11.md`, `plan_review_T12.md` line 10 of each). The eval corpus files `e4_suite.jsonl` and `e4_trigger.jsonl` are present in `docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/runs/`, and `analyze_e4.py:97–110` implements the false-fire measurement (per-overlay det vs LLM fire counts).

**AC 2 — Deterministic vs LLM routing per the registry trigger field**

MET. `registry.py:165` exposes `"overlay_routing": routing.get("overlay_routing")` in every criterion descriptor. `criteria_routing.json` carries `"overlay_routing": "deterministic"` or `"llm"` on every T-overlay entry (7 deterministic, 7 llm entries found). `registry.py:275–280` defines `_DET_OVERLAY_RULES` for the low-FP deterministic set (T5a, T5d, T7, T12). The Scope requirement — T10/T11/T12 LLM-routed for plans — is confirmed at `criteria_routing.json:1057, 1100, 1135` (`"overlay_routing": "llm"`).

**AC 3 — Trigger precision measured on the eval corpus**

MET. `e4_singleturn.py:62–66` runs a dedicated TRIGGER job comparing `G.det_overlays()` vs `r4.llm_router()` per ticket and writing `e4_trigger.jsonl`. `analyze_e4.py:97–110` computes per-overlay det vs LLM fire counts and disagreements for T10/T11/T12/T8/T9/T1. Concrete results are recorded in `docs/experiments/plan-review-finalize-and-threepass.md` §3 (line 61–63): T11 det 2/19 vs LLM 0 ("both the bash→Python strangler, not data-migration"); T12 det 7/19 vs LLM 0 — directly confirming the routing decision.

**Scope — T1–T12 overlay catalog ships as library prompts**

MET. All 12 T-overlay prompt files (`plan_review_T1.md` through `plan_review_T12.md`, including T5a–T5e sub-variants) are present in `src/rebar/llm/reviewers/`. T1–T12 (all sub-variants) are registered in `CANONICAL_LLM` (`registry.py:86–101`). Unit test `test_overlay_triggers_are_low_fp_set` (`tests/unit/test_plan_review.py:259–261`) exercises the deterministic trigger set.
